title: balsamorhiza × terebinthacea
intro: Balsamorhiza × terebinthacea, also known as the hybrid balsamroot or terebinthroot, is a rare and unique plant species that is a result of the hybridization between Balsamorhiza deltoidea and Pseudognaphalium thermophilum (formerly Gnaphalium thermophilum) or more commonly a hybrid between Balsamorhiza deltoidea and Gnaphalium canescens. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Balsamorhiza × terebinthacea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Balsamorhiza × terebinthacea can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
